entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop produced in Ethiopia for food, nutrition, and income security

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the chickpea production study was conducted

entities.name: YIELD GAP
entities.description: The difference between the potential yield and the actual yield achieved by farmers

entities.name: TECHNICAL EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability of farmers to produce the maximum output from a given set of inputs

entities.name: TECHNOLOGICAL GAP RATIO
entities.description: A measure of the difference between the frontier of technology and the actual technological level of farmers

entities.name: TWO-STEP META FRONTIER MODEL
entities.description: A statistical approach used to compare technical efficiencies and technological gaps across different regions

entities.name: META TECHNICAL EFFICIENCY
entities.description: Efficiency measured relative to a meta-frontier that encompasses all possible technologies

entities.name: IMPROVED CULTIVARS
entities.description: Enhanced crop varieties developed to increase yield and productivity

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural management techniques used to improve crop production

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: NUTRITION SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having access to food that provides necessary nutrients for a healthy life

entities.name: INCOME SECURITY
entities.description: The stability of financial earnings derived from agricultural production

entities.name: RAINWATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of collecting and managing rainwater to optimize crop growth

entities.name: EXTENSION SUPPORT
entities.description: Technical assistance and education provided to farmers to improve their practices
